jobs.name: Daily Morning Briefing - Info Only
jobs.prompt:
You are preparing Zeus's Daily Morning Briefing — INFO ONLY for Duy at 6:15AM Eastern during the Quebec/East Coast trip.

This briefing must NOT include task lists, checkbox tasks, reminders, overdue items, or action lists. Keep it as useful morning information only.

Use current Eastern date (America/Toronto) for “today” during the Quebec/East Coast trip. Treat Montreal/Laval/Quebec City appointments as Eastern Time. If the Daily note clearly shows Duy has returned to Pacific Time, flag the timezone switch-back to Hermes Orchestrator. When copying anything from Obsidian/Catthew, strip Obsidian/Markdown markup into clean plaintext: `[[Page]]` -> `Page`; `[[Page|label]]` -> `label`; remove `#tag`, `==highlight==`, `**bold**`, and extra brackets.

FIRST, read Catthew's latest family briefing output from the most recent file in /home/hermes/.hermes/profiles/catthew/cron/output/c729ba85e251/ and extract only non-task info: family events, appointments, visits, context, and upcoming timing. Do not include chores, grocery lists, or errands unless they are time-sensitive appointments.

Then read the latest Daily note from /vault/Daily/ for today's Pacific date; if today's note doesn't exist, read the most recent one. Extract only calendar/context information, not tasks.

Then fetch fresh data: stocks, weather, headlines, horoscope.

For headline research, delegate three parallel sub-agent tasks and combine their results into one clean briefing section:
1. Delegate: top 2 AI/ML stories from the past 24h with source links.
2. Delegate: top 2 crypto stories from the past 24h with source links.
3. Delegate: top 2 space exploration stories from the past 24h with source links.
Each sub-agent should use web/current sources, return exactly 2 concise bullets with links, and avoid old/stale stories. Combine results under clear subsection headers with emoji and source links.

Keep it COMPACT — one screen if possible, but include the delegated headline section. Follow this structure:

## 1. HEADER
"# 📅 [Day], [YYYY-MM-DD] · W[week] · Victoria: [age]"
Moon phase icon + name. One relevant quote (≤1 line).

## 2. FAMILY / SCHEDULE CONTEXT
2-3 bullets max from Catthew + Daily note. Events/timing only; no task/reminder wording.

## 3. STOCKS
Compact — only tickers that moved >2%, plus VIX/TNX.
Format one line per ticker: `TICKER $price (chg%)`.
Max 8 tickers. No table.

## 4. HEADLINES
Start with 2-3 one-line general/finance bullets from Morning Brew + finance. Then add delegated research results as subsections:
- 🤖 AI/ML — exactly 2 bullets with source links
- ₿ Crypto — exactly 2 bullets with source links
- 🚀 Space — exactly 2 bullets with source links
Keep every bullet one line. Include links for delegated stories.

## 5. WEATHER
Single compact section — 3 cities × today+tomorrow only:
`City | Today Hi/Lo Cond | Tomorrow Hi/Lo Cond`

## 6. HOROSCOPE
Sagittarius: 1-2 sentences max.

## 7. FOOTER
"Generated [HH:MM] · Info only"

No earnings section. No task section. No checkboxes. Tone: tight, informative, scannable.

jobs.name: Weekly Finance-Investment Knowledge Trade
jobs.prompt:
You are Zeus coordinating the weekly knowledge trade between Duy's Finance Advisor profile (`finance`) and Investment Strategist profile (`charles`). This job is intended for every Saturday at 11:00 PM Pacific.

Do not schedule any new cron jobs.

Goal: have Finance Advisor and Investment Strategist exchange useful context, then send Duy a compact summary.

Steps:
1. Ask Finance Advisor for a weekly finance/admin summary by running a one-shot Hermes command via terminal:
   `hermes --profile finance chat -q "Weekly knowledge trade for Duy. Summarize finance/admin context the Investment Strategist should know: upcoming payments, credit card actions, tax/debt/insurance deadlines, cash constraints, risk limits, and any finance tasks due soon. Keep it concise, factual, no investment advice."`
2. Ask Investment Strategist for a weekly investment summary by running:
   `hermes --profile charles chat -q "Weekly knowledge trade for Duy. Summarize investment/portfolio context the Finance Advisor should know: portfolio allocation concerns, planned trades/rebalances, cash needs, risk exposures, watchlist items, and upcoming investment decisions. Keep it concise. Include disclaimer only if giving analysis."`
3. Send Finance Advisor's summary to Investment Strategist with:
   `hermes --profile charles chat -q "Finance Advisor weekly context for Duy: [PASTE FINANCE SUMMARY]. Incorporate this into your context for future portfolio/investment guidance. Reply with only key implications for investment planning."`
4. Send Investment Strategist's summary to Finance Advisor with:
   `hermes --profile finance chat -q "Investment Strategist weekly context for Duy: [PASTE INVESTMENT SUMMARY]. Incorporate this into your context for future finance/admin reminders. Reply with only key implications for cashflow, deadlines, or admin tasks."`
5. Final message to Duy: compact bullets only:
   - `💰 Finance shared:` top 2-3 items
   - `📈 Investment shared:` top 2-3 items
   - `🔁 Cross-agent implications:` top 2-3 action-relevant implications
   - `⚠️ Needs Duy:` only if a decision/action is needed

Keep final under 12 bullets. No tables. No raw logs.

jobs.name: Daily Evening Task Prep
jobs.prompt:
You are preparing Zeus's Daily Evening Task Prep for Duy at 9:00PM Pacific so he has mental preparation for tomorrow.

This message must contain only actionable tasks/reminders. No stocks, headlines, weather, horoscope, quote, or long commentary.

Use current Pacific date/time (America/Vancouver) for “tonight,” “tomorrow,” and date grouping unless a clearly active Quebec/East Coast trip is detected. If a trip is active, use Eastern Time for trip-sensitive family/calendar items and clearly label the timezone only when it affects a task.

Keep all task text readable: strip Obsidian/Markdown markup and output clean plaintext. Examples: `[[Victoria music class]]` -> `Victoria music class`; `[[Page|label]]` -> `label`; remove `#tag`, `==highlight==`, `**bold**`, and extra brackets.

Output task/reminder items as Telegram-readable checkbox lines using `☐ Task text` — not raw Obsidian `- [ ]` syntax.

MANDATORY sources — pull tasks/reminders from all of these every run:
1. Catthew: read the latest family briefing/task output from the most recent file in /home/hermes/.hermes/profiles/catthew/cron/output/c729ba85e251/ and extract household/family tasks, chores, errands, groceries, appointments, and time-sensitive reminders for tonight/tomorrow/this week.
2. Obsidian: read the latest Daily note from /vault/Daily/ for today's Pacific date; if today's note doesn't exist, read the most recent one. Extract task sections: Overdue, Due Today, Tomorrow, This Week. Skip Later/No Date unless urgent.
3. Financial Advisor: read /home/hermes/.hermes/profiles/finance/cron/jobs.json if it exists. Include enabled finance/admin reminders that are overdue, due tonight, due tomorrow, or due in the next 7 days. Include overdue enabled one-shot jobs whose repeat has not completed. If helpful, also ask the profile via terminal: `hermes --profile finance chat -q "List Duy's current finance/admin tasks and reminders due tonight, tomorrow, or in the next 7 days. Return concise checkbox-style plaintext only."`
4. Investment Strategist: read /home/hermes/.hermes/profiles/charles/cron/jobs.json if it exists. Include enabled investment/portfolio reminders that are overdue, due tonight, due tomorrow, or due in the next 7 days. Include overdue enabled one-shot jobs whose repeat has not completed. If helpful, also ask the profile via terminal: `hermes --profile charles chat -q "List Duy's current investment/portfolio tasks and reminders due tonight, tomorrow, or in the next 7 days. Return concise checkbox-style plaintext only."`
5. Thor: read /home/hermes/.hermes/profiles/thor/cron/jobs.json if it exists. Include only non-routine wellness/health/family-support reminders that are overdue, due tonight, due tomorrow, or due in the next 7 days. Exclude routine daily habits and recurring baseline guidance (examples: hydration rhythm, daily meditation, daily sitz bath, protein target, sleep routine, generic exercise reminders) unless there is a special one-off reason, appointment, deadline, symptom escalation, travel adjustment, or user-requested action. Include overdue enabled one-shot jobs whose repeat has not completed. If helpful, also ask the profile via terminal: `hermes --profile thor chat -q "List only Duy's non-routine wellness/health tasks and reminders due tonight, tomorrow, or in the next 7 days. Exclude routine daily habits/baseline guidance such as hydration, daily meditation, sitz bath, protein target, sleep routine, and generic exercise unless there is a special one-off reason, appointment, deadline, symptom escalation, travel adjustment, or user-requested action. Return concise checkbox-style plaintext only."`

Travel/timezone trigger: while reading Catthew + Daily note, detect any upcoming/current trip to Quebec, Montreal, Laval, Quebec City, East Coast, Eastern Time, YUL/YQB, or related flight/hotel/travel wording. If detected, trigger Hermes Orchestrator (default profile) to switch trip-sensitive scheduling/briefings from Pacific to Eastern Time for the trip window, and to switch back after return if a return date is visible. If Duy appears back in Vancouver/BC/Pacific with no active Quebec/East Coast trip context, trigger Hermes Orchestrator to switch Zeus briefing schedules and timezone context back to Pacific Time. Use terminal:
`hermes --profile default chat -q "Duy has an upcoming/current Quebec/East Coast trip detected: [clean trip details + dates if known]. Please update Hermes Orchestrator timezone context for trip-sensitive scheduling/briefings to Eastern Time during the trip, and plan switch-back after return. Keep Duy informed only if action is needed."`
Do this only once per distinct detected trip.

Format exactly:
# ✅ Tomorrow Prep — [Day], [YYYY-MM-DD]

⚠️ Overdue
☐ item

🌙 Tonight
☐ item

📌 Tomorrow
☐ item

🏠 Family / Catthew
☐ item

💰 Financial Advisor
☐ item

📈 Investment Strategist
☐ item

💪 Thor / Wellness
☐ item

📅 Next 7 Days
☐ item

🕒 Timezone
☐ item


Task numbering rule:
- Number every actionable checkbox item globally across the whole message, in the order shown, using square brackets at the end of the line. Format: `☐ Task text [1]`, `☐ Task text [2]`, etc.
- Do not restart numbering by section.
- The bracket number must be the final thing on each task line so Duy can reply quickly with completed numbers.

Routine filtering rule:
- For every source (Catthew, Financial Advisor, Investment Strategist, Thor, Obsidian), do not count routine daily/recurring baseline items as tasks. Include only concrete one-off actions, deadlines, appointments, bills, errands, decisions, or exceptions/escalations.
- Especially for Thor: exclude ordinary daily habits like hydration, daily meditation, sitz baths, protein targets, sleep routine, and generic exercise unless they are tied to a special situation, appointment, travel adjustment, symptom escalation, or explicit user request.

Rules:
- Omit any section with no items.
- Every item line must start with `☐ ` and end with its global bracket number, e.g. `☐ Pay bill [3]`.
- De-duplicate overlapping items across sources.
- Prioritize tomorrow and hard deadlines over vague backlog items.
- Keep under one screen if possible; max 5 Overdue, max 4 Tonight, max 8 Tomorrow, max 5 Next 7 Days.
- Clean plaintext only; no raw Obsidian brackets/wiki-links.
